title: scrophularia xanthoglossa
intro: Scrophularia xanthoglossa, also known as golden root or scorpion root, is a perennial plant belonging to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, as well as its potential to support liver and kidney health. The health benefits of Scrophularia xanthoglossa are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Scrophularia xanthoglossa is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in herbal capsules or powders to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
